Confidential Incident Report — Qilong Robotics Holdings Co., Ltd. (STAR Market issuer, code 88X123), 统一社会信用代码 U S C C: 91QL-00F3-9Z0G-00 0M, date 2026-06-04.
On 2026-06-03, our SOC detected anomalous SFTP from cn-beijing to an overseas node resulting in unauthorized access to the “Project Mangrove” vendor due diligence pack containing draft commercial terms and an unpublished ESG climate-risk briefing intended for CSRC filing.
As the materials include deal-stage pricing ranges and scope for a five-year motor drive supply, they constitute inside information under the PRC Securities Law and are subject to an internal trading blackout until 2026-07-15.
Preliminary logs indicate exposure of limited PI: masked employee 居民身份证号 (e.g., 41 02**********123X), partial payroll bank suffixes (****6623), and two contractor emails; no data relating to minors under 14 was identified.
A misconfigured job briefly synchronized a redacted draft to a Hong Kong mirror (https://files.qilong.hk/m ir ror?doc=MGV- 2 6), triggering a cross-border transfer scenario requiring CAC 出境数据安全评估 under PIPL/CSL/DSL.
The issuer insider list for Project Mangrove has been updated to include Mr. Han Weiming (CFO), Ms. Zhao Rui (Head of IR), and Dr. Lin Qiao (ESG advisor), all subject to the information barrier and do‑not‑trade restrictions; attestations due EOD.
We have isolated the “RM‑Research” chat room and applied an information barrier after an Ops trainee, Mr. Chen Kai, forwarded a climate scenario draft to a logistics vendor, although at this stage we have found no evidence of tipping or selective disclosure.
Separately, the cyber review found that a dev repo referenced test wallets from a digital asset custody POC with Lianhui Digital Bank under a PBoC sandbox; no keys were present, and this crypto pilot has not been publicly announced.
Technical indicators match public CERT-CN advisory CVE‑2026‑1234; EDR containment complete, and no persistence observed after 02:41 CST.
Remediation: revoke compromised credentials, rotate SFTP, notify 网信办 within statutory hours, launch PIPL impact assessment, and prepare CSRC/SSE clarification in case of market rumors.
This communication is for internal compliance and is not intended as selective disclosure; any external announcements will follow issuer obligations under SSE Listing Rules and be coordinated with the designated media.
Training note: during Compliance Week, Marketing will publish “Information Barriers 101” using our Fuyuan Cloud Tokenizer product name; this educational material mentions “tokens” but is unrelated to crypto trading.
Based on current assessment, this event is not expected to constitute a material adverse change under existing loan covenants or the draft SPA for Project Mangrove.
Data classification: the exposed content is “important data—general” under DSL, and PI was pseudonymized; cross‑border replication is suspended pending CAC security assessment and SCC execution.
Contact: Data Protection Officer Ms. Yuan Sisi, dpo@qilongrobotics.cn, +86‑010‑5588‑0001; incident case ref IR‑2026‑06‑03‑ZX‑99; internal link https://sec.q i l o n g .cn/case?id=ZX9 1‑AB 3.
Log excerpt (obfuscated): user=zhao.rui@qilongrobotics.cn; resID=41 02**********123X; acct=CN**-****-88-6623; path=/mnt/proj‑M an gr ove/v dd/term‑sheet_v0 4.pdf; hash=ae12: b3 9f: 77c; uploader=svc.sftp‑mir ror@int.qilong.cn.
